basics.description: Deploys the **JA4/JA4S Threat Hunting** workbook to a Microsoft Sentinel / Log Analytics workspace. Pick the workspace it should run against.

basics.name: workbookDisplayName
basics.label: Workbook name
basics.toolTip: Name shown under Microsoft Sentinel > Workbooks.

basics.name: workspaceSelector
basics.label: Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace
basics.toolTip: The workspace the workbook queries. Must contain Defender XDR DeviceNetworkEvents / SecurityIncident data.
